user.title: WeatherFlow Lightning Trilateration
user.description:
Configure Tempest stations for lightning trilateration.

API Token: Log in to tempestwx.com, go to Settings > Data Authorizations, and generate a token.
Primary Station: Enter your station ID or coordinates as lat,lon.
Neighboring Stations: Enter a comma-separated list of nearby station IDs (at least 2 are required to calculate strikes).

data.primary_station: Primary Station (ID or coordinates as lat,lon)

error.empty_primary: The primary station ID or coordinate cannot be empty.
